site_info.name: Side Quest
site_info.description: A platform for turning your boring life into an adventure by completing real-world side quests.

faqs.answer: You earn XP by completing side quests! Different quests have different XP rewards based on their difficulty. Check the 'Quests' tab on your dashboard to see available tasks.
Side Quests are real-world tasks you can complete to earn rewards on the platform. They range from simple habits to adventurous challenges.
You can play chess by clicking 'Chess' in the navbar or sidebar. We offer both a standard experience and a 'Professional' mode with ELO ratings and advanced analysis.
The platform is a Progressive Web App (PWA). You can install it on your mobile device by selecting 'Add to Home Screen' in your browser menu (Chrome) or 'Share > Add to Home Screen' (Safari).
If you need human assistance, you can switch the chat mode to 'Live Support' to speak with an administrator.

quest_tips.easy: Easy quests are great for beginners. They usually involve simple daily tasks.
quest_tips.medium: Medium quests require a bit more effort and often focus on habit building.
quest_tips.hard: Hard quests are challenges that might take a few days or significant effort to complete.
quest_tips.insane: Insane quests are major life adventures or very difficult challenges!
